site.title: Eumel
home.heading: Welcome to Eumel
home.intro: This is your Go + HTMX base template: stdlib routing, server-rendered templates, Tailwind CSS, SQLite and multi-language strings — everything wired up and ready to build on.
todos.heading: HTMX demo: todos
todos.empty: Nothing here yet — add your first todo above.
about.heading: About
about.body: Replace this page with your own content. All text lives in the locales folder, so templates never contain hardcoded strings.

error.500.body: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
footer.text: Built with Go, HTMX and Tailwind CSS.
